arts.ttl: £10m Nottingham Forest player has wowed Nuno Espírito Santo on the training ground
Pep Guardiola warns Man City to avoid potential ‘big mistake’ ahead of Forest clash
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has highlighted the “big mistake” he wants Manchester City to avoid as they bid to turnaround their awful form in the Premier League. The reigning champions head into Wednesday evening’s meeting with Nottingham Forest in Eastlands without a win in seven games in all competitions, including four consecutive defeats in the league. arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot produced a tactical masterclass against Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and effectively knocked the champions out of the title race.
